violations.text: No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2026

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by equipment. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. PIC moved items. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer and floor mixer bowl) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took items out of service to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
The non-food contact surfaces around fryer/flattop grill area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
